javadoc_before:
/** * Rethrow the supplied {@link Throwable exception} if it is * blacklisted. * *

If the supplied {@code exception} is not blacklisted, * this method does nothing. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Rethrow the supplied {@link Throwable exception} if it is * unrecoverable. * *

If the supplied {@code exception} is not unrecoverable, this * method does nothing. * * @deprecated Use {@link UnrecoverableExceptions#rethrowIfUnrecoverable} * instead. */
